perks.summary: preflight check: config backend valid, skills dir exists, screenpipe reachable, LLM backend ready
paginate the local screenpipe /search API over a time window into a normalized timeline JSON
scrub emails, API keys, bearer tokens, JWTs, phones, SSNs from timeline text and window titles
segment a timeline into sessions on idle gaps, then cluster sessions by app-signature
rank each cluster against sibling SKILL.md descriptions via local sentence-transformers embeddings (top-k cosine)
LLM judge classifies each cluster as reuse / compose / novel and drafts a SKILL.md body
move a user-approved proposal directory into skills/<name>/ (refuses to overwrite)
